zh.Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschla: 德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophia Wettin von Meissen於1214年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯時，她的父親Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen52歲，母親Jutta von Thüringen11211歲。她和Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen至少有1個兒子。她去世於1280年3月17日在德國享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophia Wettin von Meissen于1214年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯时，她的父亲Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen52岁，母亲Jutta von Thüringen11211岁。她和Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen至少有1个儿子。她去世于1280年3月17日在德国享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Meissen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

nameMeanings.name: Wettin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Johan, Tor.
Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an altered form of the (placename) element väst ‘west’ + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’. Compare Westen .

variants.name: Westen
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from any of the very many places in England named in Old English as ‘the western enclosure’, from west ‘west’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophia Wettin von Meissen was born in 1214, in Meißen, Saxony, Germany, her father, Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen, was 52 and her mother, Jutta von Thüringen, was 11211. She had at least 1 son with Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen. She died on 17 March 1280, in Germany, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophia Wettin von Meissen est née en 1214, à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Jutta von Thüringen, avait 11211 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen. Elle est décédée le 17 mars 1280, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophia Wettin von Meissen 1214 in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen 52 und ihre Mutter Jutta von Thüringen 11211. Sie hatte mit Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 17. März 1280 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia Wettin von Meissen è nata il nel 1214 nel Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Jutta von Thüringen, aveva 11211 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen. Morì il 17 marzo 1280, nel Germania, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophia Wettin von Meissenが1214年にドイツサチセンクレイス メイssンで生まれた時，父Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißenは52歳，母Jutta von Thüringenは11211歳であった。彼女はHeinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1280年3月17日にドイツで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophia Wettin von Meissen(이)가 1214년 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jutta von Thüringen(은)는 11211세였다. 그녀는 Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 3월 17일 독일에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia Wettin von Meissen nasceu em 1214, em Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Jutta von Thüringen, tinha 11211 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen. Ela faleceu em 17 de março de 1280, em Alemanha, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophia Wettin von Meissen родилась в 1214 г. в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Jutta von Thüringen, 11211. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen. Она умерла 17 марта 1280 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophia Wettin von Meissen nació en 1214, en Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Jutta von Thüringen, tenía 11211 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1280, en Alemania, a la edad de 66 años.
